items.statcast_observation: Jac Caglianone produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 109.8 mph at a 17.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals beat the San Diego Padres, KC 6, SD 1. Lane Thomas led the night, 2-4 | HR, 2B, 2 RBI in the latest Royals game. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 109.8 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Padres Recap
